license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ivece3e
title: Modified Qiagen PCR purification (no gel extraction) with MinElute spin column.
author: Daniel J. Richter

steps_raw.instruction: Add 5 volumes of Buffer PB to PCR and mix.
Place 800 μL of sample in a QIAquick column within a collection tube, spin at maximum speed for 1 minute. undetermined 00:01:00
If any sample remains, continue spinning through column and discard flow-through.
Wash with 750 μL of buffer PE, centrifuge for 1 minute, discard flow-through. undetermined, buffer PE 00:01:00
Clean top edge and bottom edge of collection tube by pipetting out remaining liquid with P20. Modified from original kit protocol.
Place column with hinge facing INWARDS and spin for 1 minute. 00:01:00 Modified from original kit protocol.
Place column with hinge facing OUTWARDS and spin for 1 minute at maximum speed. 00:01:00 Modified from original kit protocol.
Place column in new 1.5 μL Eppendorf tube.
Centrifuge at maximum speed for 1 minute to elute. 00:01:00
